title: J.N. Medical College Hospital Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: J.N. Medical College Hospital Nursing Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of J.N. Medical College Hospital. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the J.N. Medical College Hospital Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in General Nursing & Midwifery, B.Sc. Nursing, Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing, Registered as Nurse and Midwife
qualification.details: Diploma in General Nursing & Midwifery / B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing degree from a recognized Institution. Registered as Nurse and Midwife at the State Nurse & Midwives Registration Council, by whichever name constituted, by the respective State Government.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for J.N. Medical College Hospital Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the J.N. Medical College Hospital Nursing Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the J.N. Medical College Hospital Nursing Officer posts is 08-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Nursing Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for the Nursing Officer position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Nursing Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Diploma in General Nursing & Midwifery, B.Sc. Nursing, or Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing degree and be registered as a Nurse and Midwife.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Nursing Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Nursing Officer post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Nursing Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 19350 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Nursing Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a screening stage.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the Nursing Officer posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by J.N. Medical College Hospital.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location is Aligarh, Uttar Pradesh.
